passives.name: Money In The Bank
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] and ability hits have a 12% chance to store between {{g|30}} and {{as|240|gold}} ({{fd|2.5}}-second cooldown per attack/ability). If you win the round, gain {{g|gold}} equal to the stored amount, otherwise lose 25% of it.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] and ability hits have a 12% chance to store between {{g 30}} and {{as 240 gold}} ({{fd 2.5}}-second cooldown per attack/ability)

modifiers.historical_patch_note: V14.12 patch history briefly raised max per-trigger stored gold to 245, but current canonical effect text is 240 after Arena rotation returns.

effects_structured.raw: If you win the round, gain {{g gold}} equal to the stored amount, otherwise lose 25% of it.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Money In The Bank stores gold on qualifying basic-attack on-hit and ability-hit events with a 2.5-second per-attack/ability throttle.
Player-visible behavior: stored gold resolves at round end as full payout on round win or 25% loss on round loss.
Patch-history reconciliation: current canonical per-trigger storage cap is 240; V14.12 patch history includes a historical 245-cap interval that is retained as context only.
Page notes indicate gold storage can continue briefly after winner determination before the next round starts; this edge timing is documented but not explicitly modeled.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).
